name: Orange Crispy Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. For tenderness and appearance, cut the beef strips diagonally across the grain.
2. In a small bowl, toss beef strips with a sprinkling of salt. Stir in beaten egg white.
3. In a medium bowl, prepare batter by combining flour, cornstarch, and baking powder. Mix egg yolk with half of the water and add to the mixture. Whisk in additional water until a smooth, runny batter develops.
4. Heat oil to 325°F (163°C). Dip beef strips in batter. Carefully place strips in hot oil and fry for about a minute or until the batter is set. Drain and set aside. Keep oil hot.
5. In another wok, heat a tablespoon of oil. Combine and add ginger, garlic, orange zest, mandarin zest, and scallions. Stir fry for about 30 seconds.
6. Add chili sauce, white cooking wine, chicken broth, soy sauce, and sugar to the mixture. Stir until thick and shiny. Keep warm.
7. Re-fry beef strips in batches. Drain and quickly stir into the thickened orange sauce.
8. Serve hot with bowls of steamed rice. Serves 4.
